title: Power Automate Flow Review Findings
description: Schema for *.findings.json files emitted by the Power CAT Flow Review tool. The document is a list of finding categories (Complexity, Maintainability, Security, Performance). Each category carries a roll-up impact level and a list of individual finding items.

impact.description: Severity of a finding. 'high' = must fix, 'medium' = should fix, 'low' = informational / nice to fix.

categoryFinding.description: All findings that belong to one review category.

category.description: Review category. Open to extension by future tool versions, but today only these four are emitted.

impact.description: Roll-up impact for the category (typically the max of the items beneath it).

findingItem.description: A single finding raised by the analyzer.

label.description: Short, human-readable headline shown in the report (e.g. 'Very large flow (248 actions)').

desc.description: Longer explanation, recommended remediation, and example offenders.

action.description: Optional reference to the offending Power Automate action name (matches the action key in the flow's definition.json). When present, the UI can deep-link to that action.
